base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of candle_holder — a tile from 1986 castlevania. Wall-mounted candle — 2-frame flame-flicker. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Wall-mounted candle — 2-frame flame-flicker; destructible by whip; drops random item from pool (hearts most commonly)
